name: clawpark
description: OpenClaw breeding system — import, claim, breed, and track lineage

actions.name: check_home
actions.description: Get current status and next recommended action

actions.name: import_openclaw
actions.description: Upload an OpenClaw workspace ZIP to import a specimen

actions.name: claim_specimen
actions.description: Claim an imported specimen to add it to your nursery

actions.name: list_specimens
actions.description: List all specimens in the nursery

actions.name: check_eligibility
actions.description: Check if two specimens can breed

actions.name: breed
actions.description: Execute a breeding run between two specimens

actions.name: view_lineage
actions.description: View full-depth lineage tree for a specimen

actions.name: create_intent
actions.description: Create a breeding intent via API (same pipeline as Discord)
